name: e2e-map-splitter
description: Static map items expand into read-only child tasks, then aggregate their outputs.

task.task: Reply exactly with the value shown under Item input in the Map Item Context. Do not inspect or modify files.

aggregate.task: If the Parallel Aggregate Context includes MAP_ALPHA_TOKEN and MAP_BETA_TOKEN in output previews, reply exactly E2E_MAP_AGGREGATE_OK. Otherwise reply exactly E2E_MAP_AGGREGATE_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
